package rulecoverage

func PositiveApplicationLifecycleMissingShutdownOwner() string {
    ruleID := "application_lifecycle_missing_shutdown_owner"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Shared resources with visible startup paths but no obvious shutdown owner or lifecycle wrapper."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
